export { default as SSkeleton } from './skeleton.vue';

export type * from './types';

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue';
import { useOmitProps } from '@soybeanjs/headless/composables';
import { Skeleton } from '@soybeanjs/headless/skeleton';
import { skeletonVariants } from '@/styles/skeleton';
import type { SkeletonProps } from './types';

defineOptions({
  name: 'SSkeleton'
});

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<SkeletonProps>(), {
  animated: true
});

const forwardedProps = useOmitProps(props, ['class', 'size', 'animated', 'shape']);

const cls = computed(() =>
  skeletonVariants(
    {
      size: props.size,
      animated: props.animated,
      shape: props.shape
    },
    props.class
  )
);
</script>

<template>
  <Skeleton v-bind="forwardedProps" :class="cls">
    <slot />
  </Skeleton>
</template>

export type ThemeColor = 'primary' | 'destructive' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'carbon' | 'secondary' | 'accent';

export type ThemeSize = 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl';
